title: ContentAngle
description: One conceptual angle for content production, generated from a ResearchPack during the angles stage. Represents a distinct approach to delivering the content goal.

angle_id.description: Unique identifier for this content angle.

brief_id.description: ID of the ContentBrief this angle was generated for.

research_pack_id.description: ID of the ResearchPack this angle is grounded in.

title.description: Short descriptive title for this angle.

approach.description: Narrative or structural approach used for this angle.

core_message.description: The single central message or takeaway this angle delivers to the audience.

target_emotion.description: The primary emotion this angle aims to evoke in the audience (e.g. curiosity, trust, urgency).

content_format.description: The intended content format for this angle.

factual_dependencies.description: Factual claims from the research pack that this angle relies on. Each item is the claim text as it appears in findings[].claim.

risks.description: Potential risks, caveats, or concerns associated with using this angle (e.g. audience misreading, factual uncertainty, platform policy).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this angle was generated.

status.description: Current status of this content angle.
